titles.title: God, I'm Just Grateful for You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There was no way until You made one Grace upon grace, hallelujah Even though I don't deserve it, You did it Even though I couldn't earn it, You give it

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who am I that You keep me on Your mind? God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You All my life, You've been right here by my side God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You (whoo!)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy, holy, there's only one I give You glory for all that You've done Even though I don't deserve it, You did it, ooh Even though I couldn't earn it, You give it

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who am I that You keep me on Your mind? God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You All my life, You've been right here by my side God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You (who am I?)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who am I that You keep me on Your mind? God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You All my life, You've been right here by my side God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You (yeah)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Whoa, You kept me all my life Been here with me all this time

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And I-I-I, I'm lifting both of my hands You gave me chance after chance, after chance And I-I-I, I'm giving all that I am 'Cause You gave me chance after chance, after chance (come on) And I-I-I, I'm lifting both of my hands 'Cause You gave me chance after chance, after chance And I-I-I, I'm giving all that I am 'Cause You gave me chance after chance, after chance

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Who am I that You keep me on Your mind? God, I'm just grateful for You (hey) God, I'm just grateful for You All my life, You've been right here by my side God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You (who am I?)

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Who am I that You keep me on Your mind? God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You All my life, You've been right here by my side God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You (I survived)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I survived and I'm here to testify God, I'm just grateful for You (yeah) God, I'm just grateful for You (yeah) I'm alright if they say I'm outta my mind God, I'm just grateful for You God, I'm just grateful for You
